content.en:
"Extradimensional Power !!!!"

Ye Tian is also extremely eager for this kind of power, if he can control a little extradimensional power, even if it is not much, but among the high-level peak realm gods, it should be an invincible existence, even if it is not against the weaker peak realm gods, but at least he can save his life in the hands of the peak realm gods.

"It's worth it!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

Although this information has no substantive effect and does not allow him to control extradimensional powers, the information recorded above has given him some understanding of extradimensional powers.

That alone is enough for its value.

Of course.

For many high-level realm gods, spending so many resources to buy such a piece of information must be a loss, unless they can master the extradimensional power in the future, it is not a good deal.

But many high-level realm gods are destined to never be able to control the power of the extra-dimensional "nine-five-three", including those peak realm gods.

"Those supreme forces also hope that more high-level realm gods will participate, and create some secret techniques that can inspire them, and they can also be regarded as high-level realm gods who use these top forces. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, this takes countless years and may not actually be able to create useful secret arts.

"Perhaps I hope to create a similar secret technique to absorb extradimensional power, so that by absorbing extradimensional power, I can try to comprehend extradimensional power. "

Ye Tian muttered.

And so.

In the following days, he urged the Tianyan Roulette Wheel to use another copy body in the Eternal Realm to deduce, so that it would not be spied on by the Supreme Forces and other top forces and high-level realm gods.

Time flies.

Ye Tian sacrificed a replica body for deduction, after tens of millions of years to the Dao Era, during which he also tried to study many times within the extradimensional stump area, although he would be targeted by the supreme force, but this was a helpless thing.

After all, even if he creates it, he will definitely have to use it, and once he does it, he will be known, and thus be targeted by the supreme force.

So, he doesn't care.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian studied the results.

"I've created a suitable secret technique, which should be able to shake the extradimensional power, but I don't know what the consequences will be?"

Ye Tian muttered.

He named this secret technique extradimensional absorption, but whether he can successfully absorb extradimensional power still has to be tested.

......

In the area of extradimensional stumps.

Ye Tian began to cast extradimensional absorption, and in an instant, the aura on his body began to become deeper, and the surrounding void began to be stirred.

In an instant, a wisp of extradimensional power was absorbed by Ye Tian, separated from this piece of heaven and earth, and merged into Ye Tian's body.

This moment.

One by one, the peak realm gods looked at Ye Tian, revealing a look of shock.

These pinnacle realm gods are all pinnacle realm gods from supreme forces, and they have been staying here to stare and study the high-dimensional power.

At this time, Ye Tian's movements naturally attracted their attention.

"This high-level realm god actually shook the extradimensional power, and even absorbed a wisp of extradimensional power!!!"

They were excited, but they didn't bother Ye Tian, and after Ye Tian cultivated, they would talk to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian was immersed in absorbing this trace of extra-dimensional power, although it was only a trace of extra-dimensional power, but in his senses, this trace of super-dimensional power seemed to surpass everything, and his mind and body seemed to be separated from this time and space, and gradually assimilated.

Fortunately, his strength is still quite strong, and with the assistance of absorbing secret techniques from the super dimension, he has gradually succeeded in refining this trace of super dimensional power.

However, it took a long time to refine this trace of extradimensional power.

After refining, he frowned.

Absorbing this secret technique can indeed refine the power of the super dimension, but the effect is not very good, and the side effects are a bit big.

Ye Tian said darkly.

But this trace of extradimensional power also helped him somewhat, such as making his physical body stronger.

In short, this test made him know that the extradimensional absorption was not qualified, and he had to try to improve it.

Yes, there is.

A peak realm god came to find Ye Tian. []

This pinnacle realm god is not a Stasis realm god, but another pinnacle realm god - the True Hidden Realm God!

"I've seen the True Hidden God!"

Ye Tian said politely.

With a wave of his hand, the True Hidden Realm God formed an enchantment, making it impossible for other peak realm gods and high-level realm gods to spy on this place.....

At this time, the True Hidden Realm God spoke: "Ye Tianjie God, I won't beat around the bush, you should have used a secret technique to absorb and refine a trace of high-dimensional power just now, and your secret technique is very important to us, let's make a price!"

Ye Tian knew that he had no qualifications to refuse, if he offended the supreme force, he would be in trouble.

So, he could only agree.

The next step is how to use the secret art of extradimensional absorption in exchange for useful benefits, which is the most important thing.

So, Ye Tian said his price: "True Hidden Realm God, I need resources suitable for the cultivation of high-level Realm Gods, as well as more knowledge about the extradimensional aspect." "

"Good!"

The True Hidden God agreed.

The cultivation resources that high-level realm gods need, they are not lacking in these supreme forces, so why not give some.

As for extradimensional knowledge, knowledge is priceless, but it can be replicated, so they are willing to give it up.

But extra-dimensional knowledge, they didn't allow Ye Tian to leak it, and only allowed themselves to master it.

In this regard, Ye Tian also agreed.

Next, they began to discuss the specific price, but the specific price still depends on the value of the secret technique created by Ye Tian, if the value is very low, then the price given will naturally be very low.

Subsequently.

A number of peak realm gods came over, discussed together for a long time, and then made a 2.9 oath, and only after Ye Tian gave the super-dimensional absorption secret technique, the specific price was given.

And at this price, Ye Tian is still very satisfied, mainly because he is not satisfied, and it is not good.

He doesn't have much right to speak, these supreme forces don't care about his opinion, the main thing is that the extradimensional absorption has already been given, and they say that they will give as much as they want.

And these resources were directly sent to the Terran Endless Realm Alliance, and as for the extradimensional knowledge, these peak realm gods were directly transmitted to Ye Tian.

After obtaining extra-dimensional knowledge, Ye Tian discovered that these supreme forces' understanding of extra-dimensional knowledge was far beyond his imagination.

However, mastering extradimensional knowledge does not mean that they can control superdimensional power, these supreme forces must still not master superdimensional power, at most they can use a little extradimensional thing to exert a little extradimensional means.

That's all.
